with_skill.approach: DOM patching with patchElements and LazyList loop

without_skill.approach: Signal updates with patchSignals and Schedule.spaced

with_skill.approach: Single-shot event wrapper, direct DatastarEvent return, form submission via dataOn.submit

without_skill.approach: Streaming SSE, debounce 300ms, Signal+dataBind, targeted patching with Append, product descriptions

with_skill.approach: ChatRoom service, Hub broadcast, two-phase SSE, readSignals[T], signals+dataBind, dataInit, service injection

summary.notes: Eval 1: Both passed (streaming counter). Eval 2: Skill 6/6, without-skill 4/6 (ZIO-wrapping bug). Eval 3: Both passed 7/7 (live search). Eval 4: Skill 8/8 (perfect multi-client chat), without-skill 3/8 (multiple Datastar pattern errors: syntax error with PatchElementOptions, no signals/readSignals, manual JS instead of dataInit). The skill's value increases significantly with pattern complexity - it prevents errors agents would make without guidance.
